caption: The video features a lecture on cryogenic engineering, specifically focusing on the concept of Figure of Merit (FOM). The instructor, Prof. M.D. Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay, is seen explaining the topic with the aid of visual aids displayed on a screen behind him. The screen shows a graph illustrating various thermodynamic processes, including lines representing constant temperature (T=const) and constant pressure (p=const), as well as curves for constant enthalpy (h=const). The professor appears to be detailing the significance of these processes in the context of cryogenic systems, using hand gestures to emphasize key points. The setting suggests an educational environment, likely part of an online course or tutorial series provided by NPTEL.
